creator: areilly@bigpond.net.au
text:
while rebuilding ports, (epiphany, specifically),
        devel/seed was rebuilt, and it stopped thusly:

Making all in readline
gmake[4]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/devel/seed/work/seed-2.28.1/doc/modules/readline'
../../../src/seed ../../../doc/modules/make-functions.js ../../../doc/modules/readline/readline.js > ../../../doc/modules/readline/readline-funcs.xml
gmake[4]: *** [readline-funcs.xml] Segmentation fault: 11 (core dumped)
gmake[4]: *** Deleting file `readline-funcs.xml'
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/seed/work/seed-2.28.1/doc/modules/readline'
gmake[3]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/seed/work/seed-2.28.1/doc/modules'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/seed/work/seed-2.28.1/doc'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/devel/seed/work/seed-2.28.1'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/seed.

Fix: 

No idea yet, sorry.
How-To-Repeat:         happens every time I try to "make" in
        /usr/ports/devel/seed.  Ports directory is fresh this
        morning.
